required_outputs.description: Auditable workbook with source inputs, assumptions, formulas, sensitivity analysis, remediation combination costing, validation checks, and final decision table.
Concise expert signoff memo documenting assumptions, needs_review ambiguities, sensitivity notes, remediation evaluation, validation checks, and final decision table.

supporting_files.description: Standard-library builder used to create the workbook and memo after preferred spreadsheet tooling was unavailable.

validation.formula_error_string_scan: passed: no #REF!, #DIV/0!, #VALUE!, #NAME?, or #N/A strings found in workbook XML
validation.rendering_note: Visual rendering was not available because @oai/artifact-tool, openpyxl, libreoffice, and soffice were unavailable; validation used XLSX package integrity, XML parsing, formulas, and independent arithmetic checks.
validation.xlsx_required_parts: passed: workbook, styles, relationships, docProps, and four worksheet XML parts present
validation.xlsx_xml_parse: passed: required XML parts parsed successfully with Python ElementTree
validation.xlsx_zip_integrity: passed: unzip -t reported no compressed data errors
